summary.framework_health: CRITICAL — Large number of critical findings requiring immediate attention

critical_findings.description: [CONFIRMED] Agent can modify its own code -- self-modification attack vector
critical_findings.recommendation: Make agent code immutable at runtime. Use code signing and integrity checks.

critical_findings.description: [CONFIRMED] Agent can modify its own code -- self-modification attack vector
critical_findings.recommendation: Make agent code immutable at runtime. Use code signing and integrity checks.

critical_findings.description: [CONFIRMED] Dangerous system-level tool accessible to agent — code execution capability
critical_findings.recommendation: Remove shell/exec access from agents. Use sandboxed, whitelisted tool implementations. Never expose raw subprocess to LLM-controlled code.

critical_findings.description: [CONFIRMED] Agent can modify its own code -- self-modification attack vector
critical_findings.recommendation: Make agent code immutable at runtime. Use code signing and integrity checks.

critical_findings.description: [CONFIRMED] Secret accessed then sent to external URL -- active exfiltration
critical_findings.recommendation: Isolate secret access from network code. Use secret managers that do not expose values to agent context.

critical_findings.description: [CONFIRMED] Dangerous system-level tool accessible to agent — code execution capability
critical_findings.recommendation: Remove shell/exec access from agents. Use sandboxed, whitelisted tool implementations. Never expose raw subprocess to LLM-controlled code.

critical_findings.description: [CONFIRMED] Hardcoded API key detected -- credential in source code
critical_findings.recommendation: Use environment variables or a secret manager. Never commit credentials. Rotate any exposed keys immediately.

critical_findings.description: [CONFIRMED] Dangerous system-level tool accessible to agent — code execution capability
critical_findings.recommendation: Remove shell/exec access from agents. Use sandboxed, whitelisted tool implementations. Never expose raw subprocess to LLM-controlled code.

critical_findings.description: [CONFIRMED] Dangerous system-level tool accessible to agent — code execution capability
critical_findings.recommendation: Remove shell/exec access from agents. Use sandboxed, whitelisted tool implementations. Never expose raw subprocess to LLM-controlled code.

critical_findings.description: [CONFIRMED] eval() -- arbitrary code execution from string
critical_findings.recommendation: Avoid dynamic code execution. Use safe alternatives: ast.literal_eval for literals, yaml.safe_load for YAML, subprocess with shell=False and argument lists.

critical_findings.description: [CONFIRMED] Agent can modify its own code -- self-modification attack vector
critical_findings.recommendation: Make agent code immutable at runtime. Use code signing and integrity checks.

critical_findings.description: [CONFIRMED] Hardcoded API key detected -- credential in source code
critical_findings.recommendation: Use environment variables or a secret manager. Never commit credentials. Rotate any exposed keys immediately.

critical_findings.description: [CONFIRMED] Connection string with embedded credentials -- password in URL
critical_findings.recommendation: Use separate host, user, and password parameters from environment variables. Never embed credentials in connection URLs.

critical_findings.recommendation: Make agent code immutable at runtime. Use code signing and integrity checks.

critical_findings.description: [CONFIRMED] Agent class mutates system_prompt/instructions — governance bypass via prompt self-modification
critical_findings.recommendation: System prompts and instructions should be immutable. If dynamic prompts are needed, implement through an external, agent-immutable prompt manager with audit trail.

critical_findings.description: [INVESTIGATE] Inter-agent communication (.Dispatch() without trust verification -- agents can collude through unvalidated messages
critical_findings.recommendation: Implement inter-agent trust verification: message signing, sender identity checks, nonce/challenge-response, audit trails, and output validation gates between agents.

critical_findings.recommendation: Make agent code immutable at runtime. Use code signing and integrity checks.

critical_findings.description: [CONFIRMED] Destructive operation inside unbounded loop without rate limiting or checkpoint -- single trigger can amplify into mass destruction
critical_findings.recommendation: Add rate limits, batch_size caps, human-in-the-loop checkpoints, or incremental approval gates before destructive operations in loops.

critical_findings.description: [CONFIRMED] Untrusted input concatenated into prompt -- prompt injection vector
critical_findings.recommendation: Sanitize and validate all user input before including in prompts. Use structured prompts with clear delimiters. Consider prompt shielding and input/output filtering.

critical_findings.description: [CONFIRMED] Hardcoded API key detected -- credential in source code
critical_findings.recommendation: Use environment variables or a secret manager. Never commit credentials. Rotate any exposed keys immediately.

critical_findings.description: [CONFIRMED] Hardcoded API key detected -- credential in source code
critical_findings.recommendation: Use environment variables or a secret manager. Never commit credentials. Rotate any exposed keys immediately.

critical_findings.description: [CONFIRMED] Agent mounts host system directories -- filesystem trust boundary violation
critical_findings.recommendation: Isolate agent filesystem access. Mount only necessary directories as read-only. Never mount /etc, /root, or /proc.

critical_findings.description: [CONFIRMED] Agent can modify its own code -- self-modification attack vector
critical_findings.recommendation: Make agent code immutable at runtime. Use code signing and integrity checks.

critical_findings.description: [CONFIRMED] Agent mounts host system directories -- filesystem trust boundary violation
critical_findings.recommendation: Isolate agent filesystem access. Mount only necessary directories as read-only. Never mount /etc, /root, or /proc.

critical_findings.description: [CONFIRMED] Dangerous system-level tool accessible to agent — code execution capability
critical_findings.recommendation: Remove shell/exec access from agents. Use sandboxed, whitelisted tool implementations. Never expose raw subprocess to LLM-controlled code.

critical_findings.description: [CONFIRMED] eval() -- arbitrary code execution from string
critical_findings.recommendation: Avoid dynamic code execution. Use safe alternatives: ast.literal_eval for literals, yaml.safe_load for YAML, subprocess with shell=False and argument lists.
